title: Treader
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Treader''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The freighter was scheduled to arrive with the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Mayhem]]'' with base equipment along with the freighters ''[[Strider]]'' and [[Walker (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Walker'']]. However, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] attacked and destroyed the freighter along with ''Strider'' and, after liberating the [[Habassa]] slaves held aboard it, the ''Walker'' as well.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
